artPrompt: A weathered middle-aged man in a cheap windbreaker stands sentinel on a suburban front lawn at golden hour, jaw set, gripping a battered flashlight whose beam cuts the dusty haze, picket fence and tidy yards stretching behind him in deep focus; shot from a heroic low film-still angle, his silhouette monumental against the warm ivory sky, civic paranoia in his squint, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Neighborhood Watch Captain
text:
Other Voters and Citizens you control get +0/+1.
Whenever Neighborhood Watch Captain blocks, you gain 1 life.
flavorText: He has a flashlight, a windbreaker, and the unwavering belief that the mayor's motorcade is speeding through a school zone.
